title: From Chatbot to AI Agent: Taking Action
description:
Most people still think AI just answers questions.

But ask it to book the cheapest flight tomorrow from A to B - and something changes.
It searches flights through the Expedia API.
It decides which one is cheapest.
Then it actually books it.

No more simple Q&A. It's taking action for you.

That's an AI Agent - a program that takes input, thinks, and acts to complete a task.

It uses tools, memory, and knowledge - with the autonomy to make its own decisions.

Check out the full video link - https://youtu.be/O2gerCxEXvc?si=UKe-rLCLwJX0Ac-4

#codebasics #genai #aiagent #short

title: NVIDIA DGX Spark - AI Supercomputer: First Impressions
description:
NVIDIA DGX Spark is a mini AI super computer that fits in your palm. In this video, we will unbox it, go  through initial setup and then run local inference using Gemma models through ollama. 

⭐️ Timestamps ⭐️
0:00 Unboxing and Overview of the DGX Spark
0:46 Powering Up and Connecting the DGX Spark

3:11 Hardware Architecture and Performance Overview
4:56 Installing Olama and Running Gemma Locally
6:10 Interacting with Gemma: Queries, Code Generation, and GPU Usage
7:39 Preparing to Launch Claude with Local Gemma Model
8:02 Installing Claude and Demonstrating Setup
8:28 Generating a Static Website with Claude and Gemma
11:07 Summary, Capabilities, and Future Use Cases

title: Groq vs Amazon Bedrock for LLMs
description:
Groq is a free cloud platform that gives you access to GPT, LLaMA, and other major models through a single API key. 

For learning projects it is the fastest way to get started. 

For enterprise teams already on AWS, Amazon Bedrock offers the same model variety including Claude Opus, Amazon Nova, and Qwen, with the added benefit of staying inside one ecosystem.

Check out the full video link - https://youtu.be/cTBGIKAckKE?si=LThWZ17r9MI-5nmf

#AIEngineering #Groq #AmazonBedrock #LLM #MachineLearning #short

title: Unboxing NVIDIA's DGX Spark
description:
At Codebasics, we get excited about tech that makes AI more accessible and NVIDIA's DGX Spark does just that.

It's a small AI supercomputer that sits on your desk and runs large AI models locally, with no cloud and no monthly bill.

In this short, we unbox it and explain who it's really for: anyone doing AI research or serious machine learning.

It's pricey, but it's a clear sign that AI hardware is getting smaller and more personal.

#NVIDIA #DGXSpark #AIHardware #MachineLearning #DataScience #short

title: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore: 3 Key Highlights
description:
Amazon Bedrock Agent Core comes down to three things. 

1. No infrastructure headaches so you focus on business value. 
2. Flexibility to use any framework or model. 
3. And enterprise grade security with IAM authentication and reliable scaling. It is AWS, so the reliability is already proven.

Check out the full video - https://youtu.be/cTBGIKAckKE?si=OCP2kpf5jyzendYz

#AIAgents #AmazonBedrock #AIEngineering #LangChain #MachineLearning #short
